diabetesRisk.name: Diabetes Risk Calculator
diabetesRisk.description: Calculate your type 2 diabetes risk using the validated FINDRISC score.

meta.title: Diabetes Risk Calculator — FINDRISC Score
meta.description: Calculate your type 2 diabetes risk with the FINDRISC score. 8 questions, scientifically validated. 10-year probability, risk categories and prevention recommendations.

diabetesRisk.title: Diabetes Risk Calculator (FINDRISC)
diabetesRisk.description: Calculate your 10-year risk of developing type 2 diabetes using the validated FINDRISC questionnaire.
diabetesRisk.waistHint: Measured at the level of the lowest rib, while standing.
diabetesRisk.physicalActivityHint: At least 30 minutes daily — everyday activities like walking count too.
diabetesRisk.vegFruitHint: Do you eat vegetables and/or fruit every day?
diabetesRisk.highBloodGlucoseHint: Has high blood glucose ever been found — e.g. during a check-up, pregnancy or illness?
diabetesRisk.familyDistant: Yes — grandparent, aunt/uncle or first cousin
diabetesRisk.familyClose: Yes — parent, sibling or own child
diabetesRisk.recWeight: Reach a healthy weight: A BMI below 25 significantly reduces your risk.
diabetesRisk.recActivity: Move more: 30 minutes of moderate activity daily reduces diabetes risk by up to 58%.
diabetesRisk.recDiet: Improve your diet: Daily vegetables and fruit, less sugar and processed foods.
diabetesRisk.recScreening: Regular screening: Have blood glucose and HbA1c checked by your doctor.
diabetesRisk.recDoctor: See a doctor: At this risk level, medical consultation is recommended.
diabetesRisk.recMaintain: Keep it up: Your lifestyle supports a low diabetes risk.
diabetesRisk.disclaimer: This calculator uses the validated FINDRISC questionnaire (Lindström & Tuomilehto, 2003) as a screening tool. It does not replace medical diagnosis. An elevated result does not mean you have or will develop diabetes. Consult a doctor if you have questions or concerns.
